description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Annotation that triggers on new issue comments. Run an ubuntu-latest job only if the comment contains '/check' and is on a pull request by the user cmllr. In this job, check out the repository, set up Python 3.11, install dependencies, run Django management commands to makemigrations, migrate, parse a TOML file, and generate an annotation text. Finally, add the annotation text and a label to the pull request as a comment.
